    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated values parameter.

    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated value names parameter.
     
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct parent, char pname, String UID, int minMidiValue, int maxMidiValue, int modelValueOffset, String descr)
    Creates a new parameter info for a range parameter.

    Creates a new parameter info for a range parameter.
     
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct parent, char pname, String UID, String descr)
    Creates a new generic range parameter info.
     
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct parent, char pname, String UID, SequencedMap<Object,Integer> valueMap, String descr)
    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated values or an enumerated value names parameter.
